sourceMovie.title: Shallow Hal
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Shallow Hal (2001) as a comedy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The comedy and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Click
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Shallow Hal clicked for you, Click (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Shallow Hal?
faq.answer: Try Click, Hitch, Jersey Girl—each shares DNA with Shallow Hal while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Shallow Hal?
faq.answer: Shallow Hal (2001) is best described as Comedy, Romance, Fantasy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Shallow Hal worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
